item.title: Star Trek Megadump!
item.description:
As Sechran said "Yep. Spock may have been very much the straight man, but he had a dry, razor sharp wit. And, when combat was non-negotiable, he could deconstruct enemies like faulty arguments."
EDIT: Masterful Monday Frontpage! Thanks Imgurians! I hope you all have a nice weekend! I do some reviews as a hobby, this week I've reviewed "Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth", if you're curious you can see it here https://youtu.be/tdffULeSv64 if you're interested in my other reviews, check https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter
AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Update to previous post
item.description: Update to previous post so read that one for context. So they were supposed to pay the first installment of what they owe me according to our agreement. They did not and stopped answering calls. I was already working with the police and I'm starting a civil court case against them. The lead detective informed me today that the wife from the couple, the one who signed the docs with me got arrested lol. Fuck around find out This week is gonna be hard cause still broke as hell (literally 50 eurocents in my account) on account of the non payment and waiting for my pay from work and service. But the process is started and I'll be pushing it as hard as possible. Wish me luck. I'll probably won't update for a while as there will be not much happening. Courts in my country are slow af edit: how the hell did a third post go viral lol :D. Wish I had better news for y'all but hey, at least those are interesting. I'll check back if something moves but don't expect it to be soon
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: Jeez, sorry to disappoint ....
item.description: In 1960, Frankie Lymon performed “Little Bitty Pretty One” on national television, and many Southern viewers were shocked to discover he was Black—having previously only heard his voice on the radio and assumed he was white. The live audience’s visibly stunned reaction exposed the racial biases of the time. Despite his popularity, the moment highlighted the challenges Black artists faced in gaining equal recognition and acceptance in mainstream media. It became a powerful reflection of how race shaped perceptions in early American pop culture!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Working on walking and turning corners. Part 1
item.description: Hey everyone. I have had a few setbacks over the last month with my legs and balance. I have been struggling a bit. Im finally feeling better. Im really happy with my progress. The setbacks have been frustrating, but things will get better. I hope everyone is doing well and has a wonderful day.

item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Regrettable substitution "Diquat"
item.description: The ingredient, diquat, is widely employed in the US as a weedkiller in vineyards and orchards, and is increasingly sprayed elsewhere as the use of controversial herbicide substances such as glyphosate and paraquat drops in the US. But the new piece of data suggests diquat is more toxic than glyphosate, and the substance is banned over its risks in the UK, EU, China and many other countries. Still, the EPA has resisted calls for a ban, and Roundup formulas with the ingredient hit the shelves last year. “From a human health perspective, this stuff is quite a bit nastier than glyphosate so we’re seeing a regrettable substitution, and the ineffective regulatory structure is allowing it,” said Nathan Donley, science director with the Center For Biological Diversity, which advocates for stricter pesticide regulations but was not involved in the new research. “Regrettable substitution” is a scientific term used to describe the replacement of a toxic substance in a consumer product with an ingredient that is also toxic. https://www.theguardian.com/environment/2025/jul/06/weedkiller-diquat-organ-damage-study
item.dc:creator: dbox

item.title: Misa cosplay (Death Note)
item.description: Inspired by Sozomaika's iconic art of her! I tried to recreate it as well as possible, the hardest part was setting up the lighting in a way that shows up on the clothes but not too much that the background turns purple (: *other socials: https://instagram.com/anna_himejima https://reddit.com/u/aniku_

item.title: What Happened Today - GovBrief #157
item.description: Trump's erratic overreach is creating backlash. When people learn the extent of what he's doing, they turn against him. And why not? He keeps extending the dates for tariffs and peace deals and now his own administration tells people to get a job if they want insurance. The proof is in the data showing his approval ratings are now underwater on every single major issue. And it's going to get worse because there is real pain ahead. Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear said 35 rural hospitals are at risk of closing in just his state. The July 17 rallies are more important than ever. So is GovBrief. Share this with everyone you know so we can help them see what's happening. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/brics-condemns-tariffs 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-threatens-brics 3. https://go.govbrief.today/tariffs-return-aug1 4. https://go.govbrief.today/hassett-dismisses-insurance-concerns 5. https://go.govbrief.today/beshear-hospitals-close 6. https://go.govbrief.today/patel-bongino-epstein 7. https://go.govbrief.today/officer-shot-outside-ice 8. https://go.govbrief.today/columbia-negotiating-trump 9. https://go.govbrief.today/opm-essay-questions Yesterday's Top - https://go.govbrief.today/green-resigns-shrinking-majority Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-approval-downyep Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com **Imgur Reminder - I don't have access to chat. Back later for comments. Holy cow, 6 am here. Have a great week, everyone!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Good morning from Frank
item.description:
Definitely wasn't sleeping on the floor, so I closed the bedroom door and let this guy out into the world where he spent last night zooming around while I slept. But he eventually settled down. Woke up to this face. Oh hey. Good morning, Frank.
Oh...you're hungry?
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: Election Fraud
item.description: https://westchester.news12.com/lawsuit-challenges-2024-election-results-in-rockland-county https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/online-vulnerable-experts-find-nearly-three-dozen-u-s-voting-n1112436 (Proof that voting machines can in fact be hacked and also can access the internet) https://www.wric.com/business/press-releases/ein-presswire/776992724/analysis-of-2024-election-results-in-clark-county-indicates-manipulation/. (Nevada officially opens investigation into 2024 election fraud) https://electiontruthalliance.org/clark-county%2C-nv. (Clark County early vote tally shows manipulation) https://smartelections.substack.com/p/the-press-release (Article ties all data together and why it matters) https://smartelections.us/dropoff (Article explains “drop-off” why we collect the data and what it means) https://apnews.com/article/election-security-voting-machines-software-2024-80a23479d8a767ba9333b2324c4e424b. A 2021 article warning about 2024 elections being at risk for fraud! https://electiontruthalliance.org/pennsylvania. Pennsylvania showing same manipulation. https://electiontruthalliance.org/statements%2Fpress-releases#255f8bd8-29e0-416d-953e-bd3afa9ce3c6 https://freepress.org/article/2024-presidential-and-senate-results-called-question-lawsuit-advances. New lawsuit has moved to discovery phase in New York. Calls for a recount by hand in Rockland, NY. We need many lawsuits like it but this is the beginning. Similar anomalies were seen in swing states but with a higher degree of manipulation based on the analysis. The analysis which has been peer reviewed btw. This isnt 2020 all over again. We actually have proof and a valid reason to want a review of the 2024 election. This is science, and it’s no wonder the Trump admin hates education so much! It is not on their level side! https://electiontruthalliance.org/mebane-pa-working-paper Dr. Mebane university of Michigan expert on worldwide election fraud has concluded Pennsylvania likely manipulated https://dissentinbloom.substack.com/p/the-machines-were-changed-before. Voting machines altered without public knowledge. Musk Involvement Timeline: https://imgur.com/gallery/musk-election-involvement-timeline-jwGHvS0
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Wouldn’t be a real Texas tragedy unless Cruz wasn’t escaping. What a patriot. He’s Israel’s #1 man
item.dc:creator: dafaad77

item.title: Get your hand off my mushroom!
item.description: Erin Patterson was found guilty today on three counts of murder. She served individual Beef Wellingtons to her estranged husband's parents and uncle & aunt. Three died from ingesting death cap mushrooms. Her husband was also invited but didn't go. Fascinating story. https://www.abc.net.au/news/2025-07-07/erin-patterson-mushroom-murder-trial-verdict-guilty-live-blog/105477452?utm_source=abc_news_app&utm_medium=content_shared&utm_campaign=abc_news_app&utm_content=other
item.dc:creator: Shelbelabobela

item.title: Coast Guard rescue swimmer Scott Ruskin shares how he helped save 165 people during the devastating Texas floods at Camp Mystic.
item.description: Imagine the flex this guy has on dating apps, wanna hear about the time I saved 200 kids. Also, the way he talks compared to politicians and certain Presidents shows the contrast between doing the job versus blaming others
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: Attention SN
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: A Day in the Life...(Frank edition)
item.description:
Woke up this morning and felt like crud, so I worked from home. Frank was very understanding. The white fuzzy rope is now Frank's new nemesis.
He found the regular food and decided to try some grown up cat food.
I dropped a spoon and Frank was not amused. It took him about a minute to calm down. And you know, a minute in human time is like five minutes in cat time.
The giant cat tree was climbed. And then promptly abandoned.
This is where he spent most of the day, helping me code one handed. Hope you guys are having a good day.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten
